statement: In every magma, Equation 2926 (`x = ((y * (x * z)) * y) * w`) implies Equation 1317 (`x = y * (((y * x) * y) * z)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0110
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op (op y (op x z)) y) w)) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op y (op (op (op y x) y) z))
